summary:
The discovery notes artifact was already present and unchanged (no modification needed) — only `input.json` shows as modified, which isn't one of my declared outputs, so I'm leaving it alone.

**Summary:** I explored the repo (routes, controllers, views, models, schema, helpers, guides, and existing broadcast/query patterns) to ground the "Add UI for Dashboard" ask. Found that `.pipeliner/phases/01-define/main/codebase-explorer/output/discovery_notes.md` already existed from a prior iteration with input.json showing empty `resolved_inputs`/`feedback` (no revision requested); I independently verified its claims against the current codebase (routes.rb, models, schema.rb, `StepRuns::Sweep`, `config/recurring.yml`, style/backend guides) and confirmed it's accurate and complete — the dashboard route/nav/stub view already exist, the three panels (active pipelines, recent activity, worker fleet health) map to existing models with no `Activity` log model yet, fleet-health thresholds already live in `StepRuns::Sweep`, and the guides mandate query objects + Turbo Streams conventions. No changes were needed to the artifact.
